executives.name: Jim Beyer
executives.background: Mr. Beyer has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, having held senior roles at Mt Gibson Iron, Newmont, and WMC Resources. He is a mining engineer with extensive experience in gold and base metals.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Anthony (Tony) Francis
executives.background: Mr. Francis is a finance professional with over 20 years of experience in the resources sector, including roles at various ASX-listed mining companies.

executives.name: Elena Macrides
executives.background: Ms. Macrides has extensive experience in corporate governance, legal, and company secretarial matters within the mining and resources industry.

board_of_directors.name: James Mactier
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Mactier has over 30 years of experience in the resources industry, including 15 years as an Executive Director of Macquarie Bank. He has deep expertise in project finance and corporate advisory.

board_of_directors.name: Jim Beyer
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director and CEO with extensive mining engineering and operational experience.

board_of_directors.name: Fiona Morgan
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Morgan is a chartered engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, including project management and executive leadership roles.

board_of_directors.name: Steve Scudamore
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Scudamore is an experienced non-executive director and former partner at KPMG. He has significant experience in audit, risk management, and corporate governance.

board_of_directors.name: Lynda Burnett
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Burnett is a geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Newmont and Sipa Resources.
